title: Shri Durga Saptashloki
intro: Read Shri Durga Saptashloki with Hindi meaning. Chant these sacred verses to seek the blessings of Maa Durga.
description:
|| Atha Shri Saptashloki Durga ||

Viniyogah:
Om asya shri durgasaptashlokistotramantrasya narayana rishih, anushtup chhandah, shrimahakalimahalakshmimahasarasvatyo devatah, shridurgaprityartham saptashlokidurgapathe viniyogah.

Stotram:
1. Om jnanam-inapi chetamsi devi bhagavati hi sa.
Balad-akrishya mohaya mahamaya prayacchati.||
2. Durge smrita harasi bhitim-ashesha-jantoh,
Svasthaih smrita matimativa shubham dadasi.
Daridrya-duhkha-bhaya-harini ka tvadanya,
Sarvopakara-karanaya sadardrachitta.||
3. Sarvamangala-mangalye shive sarvartha-sadhike.
Sharanye tryambake gauri narayani namostu te.||
4. Sharanagata-dinarta-paritrana-parayane.
Sarvasyartihare devi narayani namostu te.||
5. Sarvasvarupe sarveshe sarvashakti-samanvite.
Bhayebhyastrahi no devi durge devi namostu te.||
6. Rogan-asheshan-apahamsi tushta,
Rushta tu kaman sakalan-abhishtan.
Tvamashritanam na vipanna-ranam,
Tvamashrita hyashrayatam prayanti.||
7. Sarvabadha-prashamanam trailokyasyakhileshvari.
Evameva tvaya karyam-asmadvairi-vinashanam.||

|| Iti Shrisaptashloki Durga Sampurna ||

faq.a1: Saptashloki Durga is a concise and powerful collection of seven key verses from the Durga Saptashati. It encapsulates the essence of the entire Saptashati in just seven shlokas.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of reciting this stotram?
faq.a2: Reciting these seven verses is believed to invoke the blessings of Goddess Durga very quickly. It helps in removing obstacles, overcoming poverty, eliminating fear, and granting victory over enemies.
faq.q3: Is it equivalent to reciting the full Durga Saptashati?
faq.a3: Yes, it is considered the essence of the entire Durga Saptashati. For those who are unable to chant the entire 700 verses due to time constraints, Saptashloki Durga offers the same spiritual benefit when chanted with devotion.
faq.a4: It should be recited with a focused and pure mind. It is ideal to chant it in front of an idol or picture of Goddess Durga, preferably after a bath, while offering a lamp or incense.
faq.a5: Yes, daily recitation is highly recommended. Regular practice of this stotram ensures a constant divine shield of protection and promotes positivity and peace in one's life.
